title: Course Outline: Next.js
description: Create a comprehensive course outline for learning Next.js.
prompt:
Create a comprehensive and well-structured course outline for learning Next.js from beginner to advanced level.
Only provide the list of topics (no explanations).
The course should:
* Start from fundamentals and progress to advanced concepts
* Be organized into sections/modules
* Cover both theory and practical concepts
* Include modern Next.js features (App Router, Server Components, etc.)
* Include real-world topics like deployment, performance, and SEO
Ensure the topics include (but are not limited to):
* React basics required for Next.js
* Next.js fundamentals
* Routing (App Router & Pages Router)
* Data fetching methods
* Server-side rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR)
* API routes and backend capabilities
* Styling methods
* Authentication and authorization
* State management
* Performance optimization
* Testing
* Deployment and production best practices
Return only a clean, numbered list of sections and subtopics.

title: Course Topic: JavaScript ES6+ Essentials
description: Create a comprehensive guide to JavaScript ES6+ features.
prompt: Teach me the topic: “JavaScript ES6+ Essentials (Arrow Functions, Destructuring, Spread/Rest, Modules)” in a structured, beginner-friendly to advanced manner.
